full_text:
Lu Yu (Zijia) 盧毓 (子家)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Lu Yu (盧毓), styledZijia (子家), was born in Zhuo. Lost his family in civil war, he rose up through the ranks to become an Excellency. Lu Yu was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Lu Yu lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
